semantic_query_sentence.description: A single, precise sentence that restates the task in technical terms for embedding-based semantic search.

keywords.description: Words or phrases likely to appear in the relevant code.

likely_filenames.description: Code files likely to contain relevant logic.

likely_function_or_class_names.description: Functions or classes that might implement the task.

likely_models_or_schemas.description: ORM models or data structures involved.

system_components.description: Optional subsystems in the architecture this task touches.
